creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm against this proposal.

For consistency, since we already have some widely-used knobs in the ports framework (I mean bsd.port.mk here), we should use it rather than something only for a specific build tool. That means we should adjust the the build tools handlers (cmake.mk, meson.mk or what every other build tools) to follow it. And it is easier for committers/porters.
